Nestor Rodriguez

IT Support Specialist

Dedicated IT Support Specialist with 2+ years of full-cycle experience—from hardware deployment and network troubleshooting to end-user empowerment. Proven track record of minimizing downtime and elevating team productivity.

// 01 — About
Who is Nestor?

I'm Nestor Rodriguez, a results-oriented IT Professional with a diverse background in resolving complex technical challenges, protecting IT assets, and delivering exceptional remote and on-site support.

Backed by a Bachelor of Systems Engineering and a Diploma of Information Technology, I blend deep technical acumen with strong interpersonal skills to drive measurable improvements in system reliability, security, and overall user satisfaction.

Whether it's optimizing Windows Server environments, managing Active Directory, or streamlining IT workflows through proactive support, I bring patience, clarity, and precision to every interaction.

// 02 — Skills
Core Competencies
Tech Support
Remote & on-site technical support, hardware/software diagnosis, and Microsoft 365 troubleshooting.
OS & Networking
Windows Server, Active Directory, TCP/IP, VPN, and internet connectivity troubleshooting.
Infrastructure
User account administration, hardware installation, upgrades, and IT asset/inventory management.
IT Security
Secure remote access, patch management, endpoint protection, and cybersecurity awareness.
System Support
Business application support, system performance monitoring, and software troubleshooting.
User Enablement
Microsoft Office Suite, Google Workspace, user onboarding, training, and documentation.

Let's Connect

Ready to contribute dependable IT support to a growing team. Have a system that needs fixing? A project that needs an IT mind? Drop me an email.
